## Summary

- What changed?
- Why was this change needed?

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Other

## Validation

- [ ] `pnpm build` passes locally
- [ ] Manual UI check done
- [ ] Screenshots added for UI changes

## Notes

Any migration steps, caveats, or follow-up tasks.
